Item Name: Sapsquatch Organic Maple Sugar (4 Pounds)
Bullet Point 1: Certified Organic Maple Sugar
Bullet Point 2: Made completely from organic Grade-A maple syrup
Bullet Point 3: No chemicals, preservatives, artificial flavors, colors, or other additives
Product Description: Sapsquatch Organic Maple Sugar is family produced in Northwest Pennsylvania, sustainably harvested from hardwood forests. We pride ourselves on making the best sugar possible, and are confident you'll enjoy eating it as much as we enjoy making it! Use it on sweets, meats, and breakfast treats. Made from 100% Grade A Maple Syrup. Note - All maple sugar has a consistency similar to brown sugar. Small soft lumps may appear, simply apply light pressure and they should crumble. This is due to a small amount of required residual moisture, over dried maple sugar forms hard clump and should be avoided.
Value: 64.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium organic maple sugar with a focus on sustainability and natural ingredients. Positioned as a high-quality, additive-free alternative to conventional sugar, justified by organic certification and artisanal production. Packaging and branding emphasize craftsmanship and purity, supporting a premium price point.
